title: The First Meeting
description: We first crossed paths at a mutual friend's art exhibition in Hauz Khas Village. A conversation about abstract art turned into hours of talking, laughing, and discovering we had more in common than we ever imagined.

title: The First Date
description: A cozy evening at a rooftop café in Connaught Place, watching the sunset paint the Delhi sky in shades of gold. That evening, we both knew this was something special.

title: Adventures Together
description: From spontaneous road trips to Jaipur to quiet Sunday mornings with chai and books, every moment together became a cherished memory in our love story.

title: Meeting the Families
description: The day our families met was filled with warmth, laughter, and the unmistakable feeling that we were meant to be. Both families connected instantly over dinner.

title: The Proposal
description: Under a canopy of fairy lights at the Lodhi Gardens, Arjun got down on one knee with a ring that sparkled as bright as our future together. She said yes!

title: The Big Day
description: And now, we invite you to celebrate the beginning of our forever. Join us as we embark on the most beautiful journey of our lives — together.
